meanings.usage: 指大量收集或积聚财物、信息等
指个人拥有的物品，常用复数形式

meanings.meaning: 不加选择的，漫不经心的
meanings.usage: 形容不加区分地收集或对待事物
指杂乱无章的物品堆放
指对事物的感伤情绪或情感因素
形容善于节省金钱或资源的人
指做某事所必需的东西
指对某事的极度热爱或沉迷
指简短的绘画或文字描述
cut out sketches表示剪下图片
指休闲娱乐活动或放松状态
指珍视的收藏品或贵重物品
指通过查证来确认信息的准确性
指用于展示或研究的典型例子
指对现状感到满意的状态
指让人感到无聊或厌烦
boredom是名词形式，表示厌烦的状态

examples.en: People tend to amass possessions, sometimes without being aware of doing so.
examples.zh: 人们往往会积聚财产，有时甚至没有意识到自己在这样做。

examples.en: Both physical and mental energy are essential in turning out and throwing away.
examples.zh: 体力和脑力对于清理和扔掉东西都是必不可少的。

examples.en: I know someone who always cuts sketches out from newspapers.
examples.zh: 我认识一个人，她总是从报纸上剪下时装图样。

examples.en: It is a harmless habit, but it litters up her desk to such an extent.
examples.zh: 这是个无害的习惯，但它把她的桌子弄得乱七八糟。

examples.en: There is always something to do in connection with it.
examples.zh: 与此相关的总有事情可做。

examples.en: This hobby educates one not only in the chosen subject, but also in general matters which have some bearing on it.
examples.zh: 这种爱好不仅使人对自己选择的主题有所了解，而且还能使人了解与之相关的一般性知识。

examples.en: One wants to meet like-minded collectors, to get advice, to compare notes.
examples.zh: 人们想遇到志趣相投的收藏家，获取建议，交流心得。

examples.en: One wants to meet like-minded collectors, to compare notes, to exchange articles, to show off the latest find.
examples.zh: 人们想遇到志趣相投的收藏家，交流心得，交换物品，展示最新发现。

examples.en: Perhaps a trip abroad in search of a rare specimen.
examples.zh: 或许还会出国寻找珍稀标本。

phrases.usage: 多年来，随着时间的推移

examples.en: Over the years, one may well become an authority on one's hobby.
examples.zh: 多年下来，人很可能会成为自己爱好的权威。

grammar.title: What引导的特殊疑问句
grammar.definition: What引导的特殊疑问句用于询问具体的信息，回答不是简单的yes或no
grammar.structure: What + 助动词 + 主语 + 动词...? / What in particular + 助动词 + 主语 + 动词...?
grammar.usage: what in particular用于强调询问具体的方面或细节，相当于specifically或particularly

examples.en: What in particular does a person gain when he or she becomes a serious collector?
examples.zh: 当一个人成为一个认真的收藏家时，他或她究竟会得到什么？

grammar.title: As引导的时间状语从句
grammar.definition: As引导的时间状语从句，表示'随着'或'当...时候'，主句和从句的动作同时发生
grammar.structure: As + 主语 + 动词..., 主语 + 动词...
grammar.usage: as表示时间的流逝或情况的改变，常与表示变化的动词连用，如grow old, change等

examples.en: As they grow old, people also accumulate belongings for two other reasons.
examples.zh: 随着人们年龄的增长，他们还因为另外两个原因积攒东西。

examples.en: As time goes by, his collection grows larger.
examples.zh: 随着时间的推移，他的收藏越来越大。

grammar.title: But连接的并列句
grammar.definition: but作为并列连词连接两个意义相反或对照的并列分句
grammar.usage: but连接的句子强调前后意思的转折或对比，前面不用句号而用逗号

examples.en: It is a harmless habit, but it litters up her desk to such an extent.
examples.zh: 这是个无害的习惯，但它把她的桌子弄得乱七八糟。

examples.en: She would like to buy them if she had the money, but she is not rich.
examples.zh: 如果她有钱的话她想买这些衣服，但她不富有。

sentencePatterns.pattern: What + 助动词 + 主语 + gain/benefit + when...?

original.en: What in particular does a person gain when he or she becomes a serious collector?
original.zh: 当一个人成为一个认真的收藏家时，他或她究竟会得到什么？

imitations.en: What in particular does one learn when taking up a new hobby?
imitations.zh: 当一个人开始一个新的爱好时，他究竟会学到什么？

imitations.en: What in particular do people feel when they retire?
imitations.zh: 当人们退休时，他们究竟会有什么感受？

sentencePatterns.pattern: People/主语 + tend to + 动词原形

original.en: People tend to amass possessions, sometimes without being aware of doing so.
original.zh: 人们往往会积聚财产，有时甚至没有意识到自己在这样做。

imitations.en: Students tend to put off their assignments until the last minute.
imitations.zh: 学生们往往会拖延作业直到最后一刻。

imitations.en: Children tend to be more curious about the world around them.
imitations.zh: 孩子们往往对周围的世界更加好奇。

sentencePatterns.pattern: As + 主语 + 动词, 主语 + 动词...

original.en: As they grow old, people also accumulate belongings for two other reasons.
original.zh: 随着人们年龄的增长，他们还因为另外两个原因积攒东西。

imitations.en: As she became more experienced, she started to travel alone.
imitations.zh: 随着她变得越来越有经验，她开始独自旅行。

imitations.en: As technology advances, our lives become more convenient.
imitations.zh: 随着技术的进步，我们的生活变得更加便利。

sentencePatterns.pattern: There is always something to + 动词

original.en: There is always something to do in connection with it.
original.zh: 与此相关的总有事情可做。

imitations.en: There is always something to learn from every experience.
imitations.zh: 从每一次经历中总有东西可学。

imitations.en: There is always something to improve in our work.
imitations.zh: 在我们的工作中总有可以改进的地方。
